Testcase_Objective: To verify that a requestor can initiate a resource requirement
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit
Expected_Result: Request is successfully submitted and a confirmation notification is sent to the requestor

Testcase_Objective: To verify that a requestor cannot initiate a resource requirement with incomplete details
Test_Step: Enter incomplete request details and submit
Expected_Result: Error message is displayed indicating the required fields

Testcase_Objective: To verify that a requestor can initiate a resource requirement with special characters in the requirement name
Test_Step: Enter valid request details with special characters in the requirement name and submit
Expected_Result: Request is successfully submitted and a confirmation notification is sent to the requestor

Testcase_Objective: To verify that PMO can review and validate request details
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as PMO and review the request
Expected_Result: PMO can view and validate the request details

Testcase_Objective: To verify that PMO cannot review and validate request details if they are not assigned to the project
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as PMO who is not assigned to the project and try to review the request
Expected_Result: Error message is displayed indicating that PMO is not authorized to review the request

Testcase_Objective: To verify that resource management can check for availability within the internal bench
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as resource management and check for internal bench availability
Expected_Result: Resource management can view the availability of internal bench resources

Testcase_Objective: To verify that resource management can assign internal bench resources to the project
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as resource management and assign internal bench resources to the project
Expected_Result: Internal bench resources are successfully assigned to the project

Testcase_Objective: To verify that PMO can escalate the request to talent management if no internal bench resources are available
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as PMO and escalate the request to talent management
Expected_Result: Request is successfully escalated to talent management

Testcase_Objective: To verify that talent management can initiate recruitment
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as talent management and initiate recruitment

Testcase_Objective: To verify that the final candidate is selected and onboarded
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as talent management and select and onboard the final candidate
Expected_Result: Final candidate is successfully selected and onboarded

Testcase_Objective: To verify that the status of the request is continuously tracked
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as requestor and track the status of the request
Expected_Result: Request status is successfully tracked and updated

Testcase_Objective: To verify that the request is marked as closed once onboarding is complete
Test_Step: Enter valid request details and submit, then login as talent management and complete the onboarding process
Expected_Result: Request is successfully marked as closed
